title: INtravel
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtravel, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Hertz Gold+: How to earn and redeem points for free car rentals, discounts and more
items.description: This guide covers the Hertz Gold+ program, including how to earn and redeem points and the low-down on elite status. Here's what you need to know.

items.title: BofA Business Advantage Unlimited card review: 1.5% cash back
items.description: The BofA Business Advantage Unlimited Cash Rewards Mastercard has no annual fee and earns 1.5% cash back on purchases. A simple card for small-busines...

items.title: How to earn and redeem the Atmos Summit's Global Companion Award
items.description: Learn how the Atmos Rewards Summit's Global Companion Award works, how to earn 25K or 100K awards and how to maximize companion redemptions.

items.title: How to earn Air Canada Aeroplan points
items.description: Want to earn Air Canada Aeroplan points? Here are all the ways you can earn Aeroplan points, some of which don't even require traveling.

items.title: TSA wait times hit 3 hours Monday as partial government shutdown drags on
items.description: Wait times at TSA checkpoints escalated Sunday as staffing crunches across the country left passengers standing in long lines to get screened.
